title: Ideogram.AI — Search Everywhere Optimization Strategy
subtitle: 3-Month SEO/GEO Roadmap · Prepared by Growth Marketing Pro · April 2026

overview.headline: Ideogram.AI: Search Everywhere Optimization Strategy
overview.subheadline: 3-Month SEO/GEO Roadmap | Prepared by Growth Marketing Pro | April 2026

sections.title: THE OPPORTUNITY
sections.body: Ideogram has millions of users and genuine product-market fit with almost no marketing investment. AI chatbots already name Ideogram for logo generation, and TechRadar picks it as a top AI image generator. Yet the brand has almost zero presence in the written content ecosystem that Google and LLMs train on. Every buyer searching 'best AI image generator,' 'AI logo generator,' or 'Midjourney alternative' — across 1.3M+ monthly searches — is making decisions without finding Ideogram first. This roadmap captures that demand.

sections.title: OUR APPROACH — SEARCH EVERYWHERE OPTIMIZATION
sections.intro: We dominate every surface where buyers research and AI tools look for answers: Google SERP, YouTube, LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini), Reddit, Wikipedia, and LinkedIn.

bullets.title: Onsite Product Pages
bullets.body: Dedicated pages on ideogram.ai targeting specific keywords (e.g. /logo-generator). These give Google the on-page signal to rank Ideogram's domain directly.

bullets.title: Onsite Blog Listicles
bullets.body: 'Best of' listicles published on Ideogram's own site with Ideogram #1. These rank ideogram.ai on Google SERP — not a third-party domain.

bullets.title: Guest Post Listicles
bullets.body: 'Best of' listicles on high-authority third-party sites with Ideogram #1. The #1 way to get cited by ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity within weeks.

bullets.title: Backlinks
bullets.body: Editorial links from high-authority sites pointing to Ideogram's pages with keyword-rich anchor text. Accelerates indexing and ranking velocity.

bullets.title: Reddit (SEO + Growth)
bullets.body: SEO-optimized posts that rank on Google SERP, viral growth posts, and comment seeding across relevant subreddits. Reddit threads rank for buyer keywords.

bullets.title: YouTube
bullets.body: Talking-head listicle videos with Ideogram #1, plus optimization of existing Ideogram videos for buyer keywords.

bullets.title: Wikipedia
bullets.body: Expand Ideogram's thin Wikipedia page into a comprehensive brand entry. Wikipedia is the #2 cited source by LLMs after listicles.

bullets.title: Listicle Inclusions
bullets.body: Outreach to existing ranked listicles to get Ideogram added or moved to #1. No new content — just placement in articles LLMs already cite.

bullets.title: LinkedIn Articles
bullets.body: Listicles published on LinkedIn Pulse for professional audience reach and LLM citation signal.

sections.title: HOW THE CREDIT SYSTEM WORKS
sections.intro: Everything is delivered through a flexible credit system. Ideogram's engagement: 30 credits/month ($30K/month) across 3 months = 90 total credits.

rows.what: Listicle on a 3rd-party high-authority site, Ideogram in position #1
Dedicated page on ideogram.ai optimized for a specific keyword
'Best of' listicle published on Ideogram's own blog
Talking-head listicle video produced and published on YouTube
Rewrite titles, descriptions & tags on 5 existing videos
Editorial link from high-authority site with keyword anchor text
Editorial link from DA 65+ site for competitive keyword pages
Outreach to existing ranked listicles to add/move Ideogram to #1
SEO-optimized post targeting a buyer keyword on Reddit
Viral visual post showcasing Ideogram quality
25 brand-endorsing comments in relevant subreddit threads
Update existing listicle with fresh data and features

sections.title: STRATEGIC ALLOCATION — SERP-FIRST WITH AI VISIBILITY
sections.body: Marwan's #1 goal is ranking on Google SERP, especially for logo generator keywords. Month 1 leads with onsite product pages and blog listicles for logo/art keywords — these rank ideogram.ai directly. For ultra-competitive keywords like 'AI image generator' (823K, KD 94), we run guest post listicles in parallel for faster AI visibility wins while backlinks build domain authority. Reddit captures SERP real estate and seeds LLM mentions. YouTube and Wikipedia compound over months 2-3.
